arts.ttl: ‘Hero’: Son Heung-Min says midfielder Man Utd signed for £4m is one of his favourite players ever
arts.sum: Son Heung-Min has to be considered one of the best players in modern Premier League history. The Tottenham captain has been an excellent servant for...

I said after the game that we didn't perform anywhere near the level we wanted to or needed to. Ange Postecoglou was back at Hotspur Way on Friday morning, after our UEFA Europa League Round of 16 first leg against AZ Alkmaar last night, and spoke to the media ahead of our Premier League clash against Bournemouth at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Sunday (2pm UK).

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou press conference - Tottenham boss on Solanke injury, Bournemouth and team news - football.london
arts.sum: The Spurs skipper just couldn't make an impact either on the left wing or up top in the second half. *Warning, they aren't pretty!*

arts.ttl: Bournemouth loanee Hamed Junior Traoré hints at Auxerre stay
arts.sum: Hamed Junior Traoré (25) has rebuilt his career at AJ Auxerre. The Ivory Coast international joined the promoted Ligue 1 side on a loan deal from Premier League side Bournemouth…

arts.ttl: Pundits praise “magnificent” performance from AZ Alkmaar as “they had complete control against Tottenham”
arts.sum: AZ put in a "magnificent" performance on Thursday against Spurs in the UEL, winning 1-0 in their RO16 first leg. VI looked at analysts' reactions.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs. Bournemouth: Son Heung-min's record against the Cherries ahead of Premier League clash
arts.sum: Ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Tottenham Hotspur and Bournemouth, Sports Mole looks at Son Heung-min's record against the Cherries.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth lineup vs. Tottenham: Predicted XI for Andoni Iraola's side in Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Bournemouth could line up for Sunday's Premier League showdown with Tottenham Hotspur.
